description: Leading a team of 5 engineers building internal tools and customer-facing dashboards. Migrated legacy PHP monolith to a microservices architecture with React frontend.
Built and shipped the MVP for a SaaS analytics platform. Implemented real-time data pipelines, auth system, and Stripe integration from scratch.
Delivered 15+ client projects including e-commerce sites, portfolio pages, and custom WordPress themes. Focused on performance and responsive design.
